page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon 6462C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance is configured with 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs, maintaining a strict 1.0 thread-per-core ratio with dedicated CPU allocation.

This instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

The dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio position this instance as a cost-efficient option for compute-bound workloads that do not require large memory footprints or local storage. It is suitable for application servers, batch processing, web serving, and lightweight computational tasks.
